title: centaurium acutum
intro: Centaurium acutum, also known as sharp-fruited centaury, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family and is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Centaurium acutum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, reducing inflammation, and alleviating digestive problems. Centaurium acutum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or extract, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, making it a valuable addition to natural health remedies.
